scripts.dev: npm run emulators & (sleep 5 && cd frontend && npm run dev -- --port 5173 --host) & (sleep 15 && while true; do sleep 120 && firebase emulators:export ./emulator-data --project demo-project --force; done)
scripts.start: cd functions && npm run build && cd .. && npm run emulators & (sleep 8 && cd frontend && npm run dev -- --port 5173 --host)
